suggestions.title: Verify timerTrigger.maxConcurrentCalls at runtime
suggestions.recommendation: Run func start locally or in CI to confirm host.json has no warnings/errors and the runtime accepts the timerTrigger concurrency setting.

suggestions.title: Add automated startup validation for host.json
suggestions.recommendation: Add a CI startup/schema validation step using Azure Functions Core Tools so host.json regressions are detected automatically.
